Joe Root Saves Hayden From Nude Dare

Dec 5, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Joe Root Century Ends Matthew Hayden’s Bizarre MCG Dare

Joe Root delivered a headline-grabbing century that not only lifted England in the Ashes but also saved Matthew Hayden from a viral nude dare linked to the result. The dramatic twist sparked widespread reactions online, including a humorous post from Hayden’s daughter Grace Hayden. Root’s brilliant knock reshaped both the match narrative and the entertaining off-field storyline surrounding the Ashes at the Gabba.

👉 Joe Root Saves Hayden From Nude Dare
